specs.goal: Make the package the only saturated hero subject in the frame.

must_not_change: front-centered hero label with secondary side panels

specs.subject_prompt: Use the uploaded product as the exact hero subject. Keep the full package clearly recognizable as the primary visual center.
specs.package_appearance_prompt: Keep package type gift_box, primary color red, material paper gift box with metallic accents, label structure front-centered hero label with secondary side panels unchanged. Do not redesign package proportions, surface graphics, or brand texts.
specs.composition_prompt: Keep the product stable, front-facing or 3/4, and reserve a clean upper-right safe zone for copy. Preferred text-safe zone: top_right.
specs.background_prompt: desaturated neutral backgrounds only; keep texture subtle and commercial. Background must stay low saturation so the product remains the only saturated visual center.
specs.lighting_prompt: main light direction fixed at upper-left; soft directional commercial light with clean edge definition. Keep the lens language consistent: 50mm full-frame commercial lens feel; consistent moderate depth of field. Shot type: hero_brand.
specs.style_prompt: premium tea gift box visual world with restrained contemporary still-life styling | 50mm full-frame commercial lens feel | consistent moderate depth of field | tea tray | linen | neutral ceramic ware | muted wood accents. keep the full set visually unified.
specs.quality_prompt: high-end commercial e-commerce photography, premium material fidelity, stable composition, clean product edges
negative_prompt: do not redesign the package structure

layout_constraints.subject_placement_hint: stable hero package with clean upper-area copy zone
